markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, strategy, and upcoming changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Refined:** The strategy will now balance two types of content: "practice guides" (e.g., Deferred Revenue) for expert credibility and "listicles" (e.g., 8 Best Softwares) for LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**Production Pace is High:** The content pipeline is full, with 8 articles in various stages of review and 3 ready for immediate publication.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [**Sprint Manager Transition:** William Leborgne will transition to a new engagement manager after the sprint. The new manager will handle the ongoing 12-month contract.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Indexing Requires Manual Work:** Google is not auto-indexing new articles, a common issue for new sites. GrowthX will continue manual indexing and monitor the situation.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Quality

  - [**Goal:** Shift from "buzzfeed-y" content to more "meaningful" articles that provide genuine value.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Litmus Test:** An article is successful if a founder reads it and finds it useful enough to share with peers.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Content Categories:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**"Practice Guides" (Meaningful):** Deep dives on technical topics (e.g., Deferred Revenue, Revenue Leakage).](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
          - [**Purpose:** Build credibility, serve as sales enablement tools, and support social media posts.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**"Listicles" (LLM-Focused):** Comparative lists of tools (e.g., 8 Best Recurring Billing Softwares).](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
          - [**Purpose:** Capture traffic from Large Language Models (LLMs) and novice users.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will ensure a healthy mix of both content types.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Production & Feedback Process

  - [**Production Pace:** High volume is a temporary sprint artifact, causing Slack threads to be hard to follow. This will normalize to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Feedback Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [GrowthX editors are now tracking recurring feedback themes (e.g., "Turnstile is not a billing solution") to make global changes and prevent repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [Explicitly surfacing critical feedback to William Leborgne remains helpful for escalating issues to the engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [**Client Engagement:** GrowthX sees Turnstile's high engagement as a positive, as it helps tune the system to specific needs.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

### Technical & Strategic Updates

  - [**Google Indexing:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Problem:** New articles are not being indexed automatically by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely due to the site's newness. Google Search Console shows no major technical SEO flags.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will continue manual indexing and monitor for changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Sprint Manager Transition:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [William Leborgne (sprint manager) will transition to a new engagement manager for the 12-month contract.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX uses specialized teams for sprints (builders) vs. ongoing maintenance (maintainers).](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**AI Analytics Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [William Leborgne demoed GrowthX's tool for tracking LLM performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Prompt volume, competitor performance, and Turnstile's position in LLM-generated lists.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [**Action:** William Leborgne will provide an initial list of prompts for Turnstile to review and customize.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William Leborgne:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
      - [Provide an initial list of prompts for the AI analytics tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
      - [Schedule a demo of the Atlas platform for Seema Kumar.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Seema Kumar:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
      - [Request Matt to publish the 3 ready articles by EOD Jan 28.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [**Turnstile Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [Review the initial prompt list and customize for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/xbzRNx7sRBbbx7Gxqyat9PZ7HxvnGi2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
